raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-A-002] interface.f90:3 <-> header.h:2
  CHARACTER_RETURN: Fortran function returns CHARACTER(LEN=32). ABI
  inserts two hidden leading args: (char* buf, size_t len). C prototype
  declares return type 'char*' and 1 parameter. Argument list is completely
  incompatible. Undefined behaviour on every platform.
